de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2

Class MasterHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.MasterHandler

  • public class MasterHandler
extends java.lang.Object
    Instances of this class are the controlling units of the translation. They control how the translation is delegated to different SMTHandlers and collects the translations. It keeps track of the actual translation of an expression but collects also the declarations and axioms that occur during the translation. It has measures to ensure that symbols are defined and axiomatized at most once. This allows us to add these entries on the fly and on demand.

    • Nested Class Summary

      static interface  MasterHandler.SymbolIntroducer
      This interface is used for routines that can be used to flexibly introduce function symbols.

    • Method Detail

      • addDeclarationsAndAxioms

        public void addDeclarationsAndAxioms(java.util.Properties snippets)
        Copy toplevel declarations and axioms from a collection of snippets directly and make all named declarations (name.decl) and axioms (name.axioms)
        Parameters:
        snippets -

      • translate

        public SExpr translate(Term problem)
        Translate a single term to an SMTLib S-Expression. This method may modify the state of the handler (by adding symbols e.g.). It tries to find a SMTHandler that can deal with the argument and delegates to that. A default translation is triggered if no handler can be found.
        Parameters:
        problem - the non-null term to translate
        Returns:
        the S-Expression representing the translation

      • translate

        public SExpr translate(Term problem,
                       SExpr.Type type)
        Translate a single term to an SMTLib S-Expression. The result is ensured to have the SExpr-Type given as argument. If the type coercion fails, then the translation falls back to translating the argument as an unknown function. This method may modify the state of the handler (by adding symbols e.g.). It tries to find a SMTHandler that can deal with the argument and delegates to that. A default translation is triggered if no handler can be found.
        Parameters:
        problem - the non-null term to translate
        Returns:
        the S-Expression representing the translation

      • getExceptions

        public java.util.List<java.lang.Throwable> getExceptions()

      • translate

        public java.util.List<SExpr> translate(java.lang.Iterable<Term> terms,
                                       SExpr.Type type)
                                throws SMTTranslationException
        Translate a list of terms into a list of SExprs.
        Parameters:
        terms - non-null list of terms.
        type - the non-null smt type to coerce to
        Returns:
        a list of translations
        Throws:
        SMTTranslationException
